svg.title: Day 7: three retrieval quality knobs — top_k, threshold, MMR
svg.text: Day 7 — Retrieval ke 3 Knobs (librarian ki training)
1. top_k — "kitni kitabein laau?"
k=1: risky (ek hi chance) · k=3: sweet spot · k=6: neeche NOISE ghusa (credit-score table!)
Live dekha (EMI bounce query):
❌ ...1.271 (credit-score) → 1.394 (balance-transfer) = door/faltu
2. threshold — "na bolna seekho" (kachra reject)
Query "pizza ka price?" (PDF mein hai hi nahi) — Chroma phir bhi 3 kachra results deta
Bina threshold: 1.706 (Gold appraisal!), 1.779, 1.796 — bekaar
Threshold laga (dist > 1.3 = reject): pizza → "Jawab nahi mila" ✅ imaandaar
⚠️ distance mode: KAM=better · similarity mode: ZYADA=better (ULTA! scores dekh ke tune karo)
3. MMR (Maximal Marginal Relevance) — "thali banao, 3 katori daal nahi"
score = lambda × relevance − (1−lambda) × repeat_penalty (best + ALAG chuno)
lambda=1 → sirf relevance (normal) · lambda=0 → sirf diversity
lam=0.5: teeno p7 se (koi asar nahi — SCALE MISMATCH bug!)
lam=0.1: p7 + p5(charges) + p7(duration) — 3 ALAG angles ✅
Real: YouTube/Netflix/Google — ek topic ki 10 copies nahi, variety
🐛 Mentor bug pakda (BFL_chatbot rag_chain.py)
search_kwargs={'k':3, 'fetch_k':3, 'lambda_mult':0.7, 'threshold':0.9}
(1) fetch_k==k → MMR ke paas CHOICE hi nahi → diversity zero (fetch_k >> k hona chahiye)
(2) 'threshold' MMR mode mein ignore hota — silently dead. Scratch-first se hi yeh dikha!
